package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_hasprefix_then_trimprefix: `if strings.HasPrefix(s, p) { s = strings.TrimPrefix(s, p) }`
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario655Positive(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return len(haystack) >= len(needle) && haystack[:len(needle)] == needle
}
